self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Primordial Jade Regalia (R1): for 3s after using an Elemental Burst or creating a shield (works off-field too), gain 0.3% Elemental DMG Bonus (of the wielder's own element) per 1,000 Max HP, up to 12% (reached at ~40,000 Max HP). Modeled at the 12% cap via all_dmg_, assuming a heavily HP-invested build keeps this window up often. The Energy restore (4.5 every 2.5s) is not modeled (non-combat/utility).
